description: Perform actuarial loss reserving on the 'RAA' reinsurance dataset using the ChainLadder package in R to estimate Incurred But Not Reported (IBNR) reserves and calculate the Solvency II capital requirement (99.5th percentile of the reserve distribution). Use a Mack Chain Ladder model and a Bootstrap Chain Ladder simulation (1000 iterations, set.seed(123)) to generate the results. Save the analysis script to /home/ga/RProjects/actuarial_reserving.R and export the following files to /home/ga/RProjects/output/: 'mack_estimates.csv' (including columns: origin_year 1981-1990, latest_cumulative, ibnr_estimate, ultimate_estimate, and mack_se), 'reserve_risk_metrics.csv' (containing total IBNR statistics for mean_ibnr, quantile_75, quantile_95, and quantile_99.5), and 'development_plot.png' showing the chain ladder development.
